domains.name: Product Work
domains.description_markdown: Work that directly improves the product across its seven facets. Architectural decisions, which determine the system's long-term adaptability and consistency, are part of Evolving the design and Making behavior predictable at the system level.

work_types.name: Adding new behavior
work_types.description_markdown: Adding new behavior, fixing defects, implementing requirements.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: The most visible work. Capability delivered on a codebase with poor adaptability degrades every other facet with each release.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests; human executes and reviews every line

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI writes complete modules; human reviews results

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI implements features autonomously within task boundaries
agency_path.safety_required: Capability regression: Prevention or Carefree scope-shrinking; adaptability: Deterministic

agency_path.label: Human in the loop
agency_path.description: AI implements and self-tests; human anchors scope
agency_path.safety_required: All major classes: Prevention; escalation: circuit breakers

work_types.name: Evolving the design
work_types.description_markdown: Refactoring, restructuring, improving design, extracting abstractions.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: Every future pivot costs less when the design can absorb it. This is not cleanup; it is preserving the team's ability to act on business decisions quickly.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests refactoring; human executes each step

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI executes refactoring sequences; human validates results

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI plans and executes multi-step design improvements
agency_path.safety_required: Capability regression: Carefree (AST tools); design regression: Deterministic

agency_path.label: Human in the loop
agency_path.description: AI continuously improves design within architectural principles

worries.context_note: Did my restructuring change what the code actually does, even slightly?

additional_scope_shrinking.name: AST-based refactoring tools only (no edit-file)
additional_scope_shrinking.effect: Behavioral safety guaranteed by tool; wrong structural choices undone as cheaply as made

work_types.name: Making intent visible
work_types.description_markdown: Renaming, clarifying, restructuring for readability, improving inline documentation.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: Every future developer and AI agent starts by reading. Explainability reduces the cost of every subsequent decision.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests renames; human executes

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI executes renames and clarifications; human reviews

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI improves code clarity autonomously

worries.context_note: Rare here but applies for symbols called via reflection.

work_types.name: Building the shared vocabulary
work_types.description_markdown: Extracting domain concepts into code, naming things after business concepts, aligning code structure to business structure.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: When code speaks the language of the domain, experts can validate behavior directly. Every business conversation that requires a developer as interpreter is a tax on velocity and accuracy.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests domain-aligned names; human validates with experts

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI proposes domain model changes; human validates with domain experts

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI aligns vocabulary to domain autonomously
agency_path.safety_required: Domain model corruption: Deterministic (planning tool review)

worries.context_note: Renaming and restructuring carry the same risk.

work_types.name: Illuminating system behavior
work_types.business_stake_markdown: Every incident is cheaper when you can see what happened. Opacity multiplies investigation cost for every production event, audit, and compliance review.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests logging; human adds it

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI adds observability across a module; human reviews

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI instruments autonomously

worries.context_note: Logging code can introduce bugs or performance degradation.

work_types.name: Making behavior predictable
work_types.description_markdown: Establishing and honoring consistent behavioral patterns across the product surface and over time.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: Consistent behavior lets users build reliable mental models. Each surprise erodes trust and generates support cost. Breaking a pattern is expensive even when the reason is legitimate.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI flags inconsistencies; human corrects

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI applies consistency corrections; human reviews

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI maintains consistency autonomously

worries.context_note: Same entry: interface change without updating all consumers.

work_types.name: Hardening against threats
work_types.description_markdown: Adding authentication, authorization, input sanitization, access controls.
work_types.business_stake_markdown: Security failures are catastrophic and often irreversible. One successful attack can wipe out years of customer trust and exceed years of security investment in remediation cost alone.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests security improvements; human implements

agency_path.label: AI executes, human reviews
agency_path.description: AI implements controls; human reviews

agency_path.label: AI operates in scope
agency_path.description: AI hardens within scope
agency_path.safety_required: Security regression: Prevention (formal models); A2 is the practical ceiling for most teams without formal methods

worries.context_note: Security controls that are too restrictive break features.

work_types.name: Planning and scoping work
work_types.description_markdown: Defining goals, decomposing into tasks, setting success criteria, and prioritizing.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI assists goal definition; human validates every goal

agency_path.label: AI structures, human validates
agency_path.description: AI structures plans and decomposition; human validates

agency_path.label: AI plans in scope
agency_path.description: AI plans autonomously within established criteria

work_types.name: Grounding in reality
work_types.description_markdown: Connecting the product to actual user needs and outcomes.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI suggests grounding approaches; human validates

agency_path.label: AI analyzes, human validates
agency_path.description: AI analyzes metrics and user data; human validates conclusions

agency_path.label: AI grounds autonomously
agency_path.description: AI adjusts product direction based on evidence

domains.name: Operations
domains.description_markdown: All the work required to keep the product running: provisioning and managing infrastructure, deploying new versions, and maintaining the environments that support it. Product work improves what the product does; Work on the system builds the development and safety apparatus; Operations keeps everything alive and available.

agency_path.description: Human runs deployment with AI assistance
AI orchestrates deployment; human approves
AI deploys autonomously
agency_path.safety_required: Deployment failure: Prevention; configuration drift: Prevention

domains.name: Work on the system
domains.description_markdown:
Most other domains are work inside the product: adding features, evolving design, improving quality. This domain produces the execution and safety systems themselves: orchestration, CI/CD, deployment, evaluation frameworks, monitoring, oversight mechanisms, process enforcement, and boundary controls.

Building these systems well makes careless work inside the product safe. Building them poorly creates hidden gaps that the other domains' safety investments cannot compensate for.

work_types.name: Building evaluation systems
work_types.description_markdown: Designing criteria, evaluation frameworks, automated checks, and review processes that determine whether outputs meet quality standards.

agency_path.label: AI assists
agency_path.description: AI assists humans designing criteria and eval mechanisms

agency_path.label: AI proposes, human validates
agency_path.description: AI proposes evaluation criteria and mechanisms; human validates

agency_path.label: AI designs in scope
agency_path.description: AI designs and updates eval systems within quality principles

agency_path.label: AI maintains autonomously
agency_path.description: AI evolves criteria and mechanisms based on observed outcomes

work_types.name: Building monitoring systems
work_types.description_markdown: Designing metrics, dashboards, alerts, and health checks that keep the development system's health visible.

agency_path.description: Human designs monitoring approach; AI assists
AI proposes monitoring systems; human validates coverage
AI designs and maintains monitoring within principles
AI autonomously evolves monitoring based on observed patterns
Human designs all gates; AI assists with specification
AI proposes gate designs; human validates coverage and thresholds
AI designs oversight systems within defined risk tolerance
AI autonomously tightens or loosens gates based on observed outcomes
Human defines all halt conditions; AI assists
AI proposes halt conditions; human validates
AI designs and encodes escalation rules within policy
AI suggests process improvements; human implements
AI follows process in guided workflows; human reviews
AI orchestrates and enforces autonomously
Tools enforce boundaries before any autonomous action
agency_path.safety_required: Prevention required; Vigilance (documentation only) is insufficient
